steps.title: Expand the style shift
steps.content: The previous sentence says Johnson's style changed abruptly after he returned to the United States. The underlined sentence explains that change by saying he turned away from expressionist landscapes and began painting portraits of Black Americans in a bold new way. It gives concrete details about the transition rather than introducing a separate event.

steps.title: Reject unrelated functions
steps.content: Choice B focuses on travels, but the underlined sentence is about style, not movement between places. Choice C invents a personal-life event and a claim about later success. Choice D says the sentence questions the previous statement, but it actually supports and details the transformation mentioned just before it. Choice A describes this elaboration of a transitional moment. The answer is A.
